attributes.description: Every signal that data may have left the host or been positioned to leave: (1) browser downloads (especially dangerous + opened), file-sharing visits, personal cloud storage, personal webmail, AI assistants, canary tokens; (2) shellbag navigation to mapped network drives (W:-Z:) or removable media (D:-K:); (3) registry evidence of USB devices or cloud-storage configuration. This is THE panel for an exfil-focused investigation.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"(_index : browser-* and tags : (browser_download or browser_download_dangerous or browser_download_opened or browser_file_sharing or browser_cloud_storage or browser_webmail_personal or browser_ai_assistant or browser_canary_token)) or (_index : shellbags-* and tags : (shellbag_likely_mapped_network or shellbag_likely_removable_media or shellbag_unc_or_network_browse)) or (_index : registry-* and tags : (registry_usb_or_mounted_device or registry_cloud_storage or registry_network_or_share))"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Insider Threat: Exfil & Data-Out Channels (browser + shellbags + registry)
